title: Fire and  Rescue Services crew actively fighting fire
description: OUDTSHOORN NEWS : A fire broke out earlier...
bodyText:
[{"type":"paragraph","text":"Update\n Video","html":"Update\n Video"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"OUDTSHOORN NEWS : A fire broke out earlier today in the mountainous area north-east of Oudtshoorn and, driven by strong south-easterly winds, rapidly developed into a wild and fast-spreading fire.","html":"OUDTSHOORN NEWS : A fire broke out earlier today in the mountainous area north-east of Oudtshoorn and, driven by strong south-easterly winds, rapidly developed into a wild and fast-spreading fire."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Currently, the Garden Route District Municipality (GRDM) crew are actively fighting the accessible south westerly fireline, which are closest to infrastructure."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"GRDM Fire and  Rescue Services crew are currently actively fighting the accessible south westerly fireline, which poses the greatest risk to nearby infrastructure.","html":"GRDM Fire and Rescue Services crew are currently actively fighting the accessible south westerly fireline, which poses the greatest risk to nearby infrastructure."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"At this stage, the fire area is only accessible by off-road 4x4 light-duty vehicles. A combination of fire beating and water suppression is currently utlised to suppress the accessible areas.","html":"At this stage, the fire area is only accessible by off-road 4x4 light-duty vehicles. A combination of fire beating and water suppression is currently utlised to suppress the accessible areas."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The northern fireline remains inaccessible, is completely out of control, and has crossed several ridges. Wind conditions are currently moderate, with intermittent gusts.","html":"The northern fireline remains inaccessible, is completely out of control, and has crossed several ridges. Wind conditions are currently moderate, with intermittent gusts."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"GRDM’s night-shift crew will relieve the current teams on the fireline. Ground crews will resume suppression and mop-up operations in accessible areas from 06:00 tomorrow morning.If you spot a veld or wildfire, please report it immediately to the GRDM Emergency Call Centre on 044 805 5071 or via WhatsApp on 081 709 5193.","html":"GRDM’s night-shift crew will relieve the current teams on the fireline. Ground crews will resume suppression and mop-up operations in accessible areas from 06:00 tomorrow morning.

If you spot a veld or wildfire, please report it immediately to the GRDM Emergency Call Centre on 044 805 5071 or via WhatsApp on 081 709 5193."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Your browser does not support HTML5 video.","html":""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Fire and  Rescue Services crew actively fighting fire
